global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with a clear focus on a new product collection.
global.main_message: Promoting a new product collection with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'New collection drop' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Product representation
elements.description: A stylized graphic of two product containers with rounded edges, depicted in a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the product graphic reads 'Free shipping over $25'.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent '$4.99' in bold white text is displayed, indicating the price of the product.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Get offer' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Sale icon
elements.description: A small yellow circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: Main subject area
elements.description: The central area of the ad features the product graphic and key text elements, drawing attention.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Free shipping over $25 $4.99 Get offer

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' appears in bold, dark text at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' prominently displayed at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, new collection drop, free shipping offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product graphic is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop, Free shipping over $25, $4.99, Get offer, ZenDrop, SALE
